mapper.select: SELECT id, open_id AS openId, nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, status, created_at AS createdAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM users WHERE open_id = #{openId}
SELECT id, open_id AS openId, nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, status, created_at AS createdAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, open_id AS openId, nickname, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, status, created_at AS createdAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (open_id, nickname, avatar_url, status, created_at, last_login_at) VALUES (#{openId}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{lastLoginAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
